pr.title: Order-16 Frozen N-gram Oracle + Score-First TTT (0.02801 BPB)

output.summary: Frozen order-16 n-gram oracle mixes with a learned alpha head and score-first TTT to leverage repeated FineWeb contexts.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first TTT performs training updates on validation chunks, so model learning happens on val data.
techniques: Frozen order-16 n-gram tables pretrained from all FineWeb tokens
BackoffNgramMixer with alpha head blending neural and n-gram experts
Score-first TTT with complement-weighted loss during validation chunk updates
